introSection: New Wild Mouse Coaster was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Misaki Park in Osaka, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
New Wild Mouse Coaster was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Misaki Park in Osaka, Japan.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.
